The '''''Parjai''''' ([[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] for "Victory") was a [[Kandosii-type dreadnaught|''Kandosii''-type dreadnaught]] that fought at the [[Taris Siege|Siege of Taris]].

In that conflict, [[Cassus Fett]] ordered ''Parjai'' and ''[[Gratua]]'' to return the captures to the south orbital area of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] for processing.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==

*[[Knights of the Old Republic: War 4|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 4]]
